parsed.rationale: The task passes. The visual input montage provides concrete, specific constraints: a clear layout grid with header bands, three aligned top cards, a designated final-callout location, normalized margins and protected footer area; a logo/seal asset; and a style reference specifying navy/teal/gold palette, all-caps section band, typography, margins, and protected legal/footer region. The gold_turn1 deck visibly instantiates these constraints: both slides use the branded top header and teal section band, maintain the footer/protected region, and place content into rounded cards aligned to the indicated upper row/grid without obvious overlap. The gold_final deck preserves the same layout and styling while revising slide 1 as instructed by adding the gold-bordered callout in the designated lower-right area; this matches the layout-grid note that the final callout must stay there and is stylistically consistent with the reference. No obvious overlaps, margin violations, or arbitrary styling contradictions are visible.
